name: Liturgy II
text: At the end of a tactical action in this unit's system, you may place or move 1 nexus token into any system that contains your units.

name: Non-Euclidean Geometries
text: During your tactical actions, apply +1 to the move value of any ship that starts its movement in a system that contains 1 or more of oyur nexus tokens.

name: Defensive Architecture
text: After 1 or more hits are produced against your units during space combat, you may exhaust this card to cancel 1 of those hits. If you do, produce 1 hit and assign it to 1 of your opponent's ships.

name: Resonance Drive
text: During movement, apply +1 to the move value of your ships that are transporting a number of units equal to their capacity value.

name: Molecular Binding
text: At the start of your turn, you may replace 1 of your fighters on the game board with 1 destroyer from your reinforcements, or 2 infantry on any planet you control with 1 mech from your reinforcements.

name: Cinderborn II
text: When this unit would be destroyed, roll 1 die. On a 6 or higher, you may produce 1 hit. If you do, place this unit on this card. At the start of your next turn, place each unit that is on this card on planets you control in your home system.

name: Ashfall Engine II
text: This unit cannot be destroyed by "Direct Hit" action cards. During combat, when this unit would be destroyed or uses its SUSTAIN DAMAGE ability, you may use its BOMBARDMENT ability against a planet in its system.

name: Riptide II
text: When this unit is destroyed, place 1 infantry from your reinforcements on its planet. If it was in the space area, place 1 fighter instead. This unit may move without being transported. Mechs in excess of your capacity count against your fleet limit.

name: Advanced Targeting Systems
text: At the start of the first round of ground combat, you may exhaust this card; for the remainder of this combat round, your mechs roll 1 additional combat die.

name: Quantum Restructuring
text: ACTION: Exhaust this card to choose a planet you control with a design. Place 1 structure from your reinforcements on that planet.

name: Resource Optimization
text: You may exhaust this card and 1 planet you control at any time to ready 1 planet you control. If that planet has an ability card, you may ready it as well.

name: Data Mining
text: At the start of the status phase, gain 1 trade good for every 2 control tokens on your faction sheet.

name: Siphon II
text: This unit's PRODUCTION value is equal to 4 more than this planet's resource value. When using this unit's PRODUCTION ability, discount the combined cost of the units produced by 1 for every 2 other player's control tokens on your faction sheet. Up to 3 fighters in this system do not count against capacity.

name: Divine Order
text: During the agenda phase, after the speaker votes on an agenda: You may exhaust this card to treat your votes as if they were placed on any other outcome.

name: Ritual Engine
text: During the first round of combat, choose one of your non-fighter ships in the active system to roll X amount of extra combat dice, where X is the number of unique ship types your opponent has in the combat.
